<div><h2>About Brush Tuna</h2> <p>Brush Tuna overhauls the Brush Presets system, providing an improved interface, and several
		new features.</p> <h3>Features</h3> <ul><li>Per-preset pen pressure configuration</li> <li>Customizable pen pressure curves</li> <li>Keybinds for quickly switching between presets using <code>[</code> and <code>]</code></li> <li>Improved preset list in Brush Presets menu</li></ul></div> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""/>
